title: create_payment
description: Create a payment intent or charge via Stripe, 2C2P, or Alipay. Supports one-time payments, pre-authorization, and multi-currency. Returns a client secret or redirect URL for payment completion.

amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD, fen for CNY)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, HKD, CNY, THB, SGD)

customer_id.description: Customer ID from the payment provider

metadata.description: Key-value metadata attached to the payment

return_url.description: URL to redirect after payment completion

notify_url.description: Webhook URL for payment status notifications

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key to prevent duplicate charges
